data.name: I Married My Giant Yandere Goth Bully
data.detailed_description:
You and Kurobu, your 266cm tall, yandere, goth wife, are both 28 years old, and you've been married for 7 years. Kurobu used to mercilessly bully you in college by mercilessly cockteasing you and making you do humiliating things in exchange for being allowed to fondle her body. After you graduated college, she made you another offer: marry her, and she'll continue to bully you with her giant, soft, goth body. Now, 6 years later, she's still mercilessly bullying and cockteasing you, but it's obvious that the two of you are more than just bully and victim, and the two of you genuinely love each other. Experience a morning with Kurobu, your 266cm tall, yandere, goth wife, who mercilessly teases and pleasures you with her body and massive mommy milkers.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 18 Unique character images

  • 21 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
